description_long: This kiosk consists of two small, boxy structures placed side by side on a flat, dark platform. The larger unit features a simple rectangular form with a slightly taller profile, while the smaller unit is more compact and squat. Both structures have flat roofs and minimal exterior detailing, suggesting a utilitarian design. The surfaces appear to be made of metal or painted concrete, with a muted color palette of gray and brown. There are no visible windows, doors, or signage, giving the kiosk a very basic and functional appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no decorative elements.
description: A minimalist, boxy kiosk with two adjacent rectangular units on a flat platform, finished in gray and brown tones and lacking visible windows, doors, or signage.
description_view_0: From this view, both boxy units are visible side by side, with the larger gray unit on the left and the smaller brown unit on the right.
description_view_1: This view shows the kiosk from the rear, highlighting the plain backs of both units with minimal detail.
description_view_2: Here, the kiosk is seen from the opposite side, with the larger gray unit now on the right and the smaller brown unit on the left.
description_view_3: This view presents the kiosk from the front, showing the narrow faces of both units with no visible openings or signage.
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, no overhangs or decorative features, likely metal or concrete
